metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Codes: Update 1 Reward List
metadata.description: Check the latest reported Bizarre Lineage codes for Roblox Update 1, expired launch-window codes, and the current redemption notes.

hero.title: Bizarre Lineage codes should answer one thing quickly: what is worth testing now.
hero.description: Update 1 changed the public code picture, so this tracker leads with the newest reported entries, keeps reward details cautious, and moves older launch-window codes into the archive.

faq.title: Questions readers usually ask after checking Bizarre Lineage codes.
faq.description: Use these quick answers to understand which codes are worth testing, why statuses change, and where to go next after redeeming rewards.

items.question: What are the latest Bizarre Lineage codes right now?
items.answer: Use the active table first. It now tracks the newest Update 1 codes reported by public sources and separates older launch-window entries into the expired archive.

items.question: Why do reward details sound cautious?
items.answer: The latest public code list describes several Update 1 rewards only as essence or chest rewards, so the page avoids inventing exact item names until they are confirmed in-game.

items.question: Why keep expired codes on the page at all?
items.answer: Because players often arrive from old videos, Discord posts, or search snippets. A visible archive helps them confirm that older !code entries are no longer part of the current list.

items.question: What should I read after redeeming codes?
items.answer: Most players need the next decision fast: open the tier list for meta context, the beginner guide for route planning, or the stand index for deeper build research.

redeem_steps.title: Like the game and meet the entry requirement
redeem_steps.description: The latest Update 1 coverage says code redemption now requires liking Bizarre Lineage and reaching level 10 or higher.

redeem_steps.title: Launch Bizarre Lineage
redeem_steps.description: Open the game on Roblox and enter the world.

redeem_steps.title: Open the code UI
redeem_steps.description: Update 1 coverage reports a dedicated code UI. If your server still uses the older flow, retry through chat or refresh into a newer server.

redeem_steps.title: Send and Claim
redeem_steps.description: Enter the code exactly as shown. The current Update 1 list does not use the older !code prefix.

failure_reasons.title: Case Sensitivity
failure_reasons.description: Roblox codes are usually case-sensitive. Copy the code exactly, including numbers and punctuation such as the equals sign in Update2=2027.

failure_reasons.title: Like or level gate
failure_reasons.description: The latest Update 1 coverage says the new code UI requires liking the game and being level 10 or higher before redemption works.

failure_reasons.title: Server state
failure_reasons.description: If a code fails right after maintenance, retry in a refreshed server because newly updated sessions can lag behind recent changes.

active.empty_title: No Active Bizarre Lineage Codes Found
active.empty_description: There are currently no newly confirmed active Bizarre Lineage codes beyond the tracked list below. Check the official channels and revisit this page after the next update or milestone drop.

about.title: What is Bizarre Lineage?
paragraphs: Bizarre Lineage is a Roblox RPG inspired by JoJo's Bizarre Adventure, with stand progression, PvP, farming routes, raids, and character optimization driving most sessions. Codes matter because they can shorten that grind with free items or resets.

Update 1 appears to have moved code redemption into a dedicated UI and shifted older launch-window !code entries into the expired bucket, so this page treats new rewards as a quick check before deeper build research.

troubleshooting.title: Why a Bizarre Lineage code may fail

sources.title: Find More Bizarre Lineage Codes
sources.description: Follow the official channels if you want to catch new code drops as soon as they happen.

faq.title: Bizarre Lineage Codes Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How do I redeem Bizarre Lineage codes?
items.answer: Launch Bizarre Lineage on Roblox, reach the level requirement, open the Update 1 code UI, type the working code exactly as shown, and submit it to claim the reward.

items.question: Where can I find more Bizarre Lineage codes for rewards?
items.answer: The official Discord server is still the fastest place to watch announcements, while the Roblox game page helps confirm whether codes are part of the current update push.

items.question: What do Bizarre Lineage codes give you?
items.answer: The newest public list describes the Update 1 codes as essence or chest rewards. Treat exact item names as provisional until they are confirmed in-game.

items.question: Why are my Bizarre Lineage codes not working?
items.answer: Codes can fail because of case-sensitive input, missing the like or level gate, using an expired !code entry, or testing on a server that has not fully refreshed after an update.
